title: Refresh page after confirming payment received

requirements.summary: Add full page reload after user confirms payment received in OrderForm component
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the payment confirmation button causes the page to fully reload.
After reload, the app is in its initial empty state (no cart items, no order in progress).
The reload happens after any confirmation feedback or success state is shown to the user.

file_operations.description: Add window.location.reload() call to the 'Confirm Payment Received' button's onClick handler. The reload should occur after the markAsPaid function is called and any success feedback (such as a toast notification) has been displayed to the user. This ensures the app resets to its initial empty state with no cart items or active order after payment confirmation.
